overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains a robust multi-platform presence, engaging a combined audience of 3,580 followers across Mastodon, LinkedIn, and Bluesky with 7 recent posts. His content, primarily focused on research advancements, academic opportunities, and grants, achieves an average engagement rate of approximately 5.32%. While LinkedIn boasts the largest professional network, Bluesky exhibits the highest per-post engagement efficiency, indicating a highly receptive audience on that platform.

contentThemes.description: Announcements of new papers, algorithm releases (CooRnet v2.0), and discussions on methodological approaches to disinformation and coordinated behavior.
Posts related to job openings for postdoctoral researchers and research opportunities for PhD students.
Announcements of new research grants awarded to the team.
Updates regarding upcoming presentations at academic conferences.

recommendations: Leverage Bluesky's high engagement for primary announcements of new publications and academic opportunities, encouraging direct interaction and discussion.

Cross-promote significant news (e.g., grant awards, major paper publications, hiring calls) across all platforms, tailoring the message and call-to-action to suit each platform's audience and typical engagement patterns. For example, LinkedIn for professional networking and Mastodon for detailed academic discussions.

Consider incorporating more visually engaging elements (e.g., short videos, infographics) on LinkedIn to capitalize on its large follower base and potentially boost interaction beyond likes and comments, especially for research updates.
Maintain consistent, specific academic content on Mastodon, as its focused audience appears to value in-depth updates on research progress and methodological discussions.

platformInsights.bluesky: Exhibits the highest average engagement rate (6.14%) among all platforms, particularly for new paper publications and research opportunities. This indicates a highly active and interested audience receptive to direct academic announcements and opportunities.
platformInsights.mastodon: Serves as a dedicated platform for niche academic and technical discussions, such as algorithm releases and methodological debates. It maintains a solid average engagement rate (4.55%) within its academic community, showcasing its value for focused peer-to-peer interaction.
platformInsights.linkedin: Possesses the largest follower base (1,850), solidifying its role as the primary professional networking platform. Posts related to grants and hiring opportunities receive very high interaction (average 4.87%), aligning with professional development and career interests of its audience.

topPerformingContent.content: Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
